measurement_note: Size is Q, the number of method calls after construction. Each tier inserts Q/2 unique five-character words sharing prefix a, then performs Q/2 prefix counts. The counted trie takes O(Q * L) total time for fixed L=5. A correct complete-word multiset that scans every stored word for each prefix query completes all tiers and is rejected only by O(Q^2 * L) scaling.
